description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a global variable project set to search-ux-4-selenium-tests-chrome-headless and a before_script that runs dotnet restore for every job. Define two stages: build and test. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, uses the Docker image ksheerasagar17/dotnet-selenium-chrome, sets a variable test_path to $project, changes directory to $test_path, and executes dotnet test. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules.
